_comment: Example Jira board config. Symphony needs a distinct Jira status per Symphony state — otherwise the poller fetches the same issue into multiple buckets (e.g. an In Progress issue would also match Rework and Merging). Before using, add the missing statuses (Human Review, In Review, Rework, Merging) to your Jira project workflow, then replace the `transitions` placeholders with the real numeric transition IDs. Get them with: `curl -u email:token https://<site>.atlassian.net/rest/api/2/issue/<KEY>/transitions`.
name: UP

repos.description: NX monorepo containing all frontend MFE sub-apps and corresponding BFFs.
